recent.statement: A new earthquake with a magnitude of at least 6.0 will occur in Mexico within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: The only in-window Mexico quake (S3) was 5.7M, below the 6.0 threshold, while the 6.0M+ events (S4, S5) occurred on 17/07 before the forecast window began.

recent.statement: A significant earthquake will occur in the Philippines within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: Both signals describe an earthquake in the Scotia Sea, not the Philippines, so no signal shows a significant Philippine earthquake occurred within the window.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6.5 earthquake will hit Mexico within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: Within the forecast window, the only Mexico earthquake captured (S3) was magnitude 5.7M, below the 6.5 threshold, and larger quakes (S4, S5) occurred on 17/07 before the forecast window opened.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Atlanta metropolitan area
recent.evidence: No captured signal provides any evidence about a severe thunderstorm warning for Atlanta within the window.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Midwest region on July 18
recent.evidence: NWS Cleveland OH issued a Severe Thunderstorm Warning on July 18, and Ohio falls within the Midwest region.

recent.statement: Flash flooding will occur in Midland/Odessa, TX
recent.evidence: S1 is a Flash Flood Warning (an alert naming the NWS office, not the city), which shows a risk condition rather than confirming flash flooding actually occurred in Midland/Odessa.

recent.statement: Power outage reported in the city of San Francisco, California
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports any power outage in San Francisco, and such an event would have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: Flash flood warning issued for the city of Austin, Texas
recent.evidence: Both signals are Flash Flood Warnings issued by NWS Midland/Odessa for West Texas locations (~32°N, -101°W), not Austin (~30.3°N, -97.7°W), so no signal shows a warning for Austin.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorm warning issued for the entire state of Florida
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows a statewide severe thunderstorm warning for Florida, an event that would certainly have been recorded if it had occurred.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorms will cause power outages in Tallahassee, FL
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports severe thunderstorms or power outages in Tallahassee within the window, so the event is unsupported.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the city of Nashville, TN
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm warning for Nashville would have been captured if it occurred.

recent.statement: Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued for parts of New Mexico
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm warning would have been captured if it occurred within the window.
